description: 4 1/2 digit bench-type digital multimeter with USB serial connectivity

commands.name: MEAS2?
commands.description: Read sub display value (NONe if sub display is off)

commands.name: FUNC1?
commands.description: Current measurement function on main display

notes: Uses non-standard flat SCPI command set - no subsystem hierarchy
Standard SCPI commands like MEAS:VOLT:DC?, VOLT:RANG?, SYST:ERR? do NOT work
Non-query commands return OK or nOK (firmware v25052021+)
